positiveClaims: DOCX comments-only review preview is product-proofed through the Review menu local-file entry.
A selected DOCX with anchored comments opens an in-memory Review session through the delivered preview-session activation path.
The opened Review surface contains DOCX commentThreads and manual commentPlacements.
The Comments panel opens through the existing canonical runtime command path after successful local-file activation.
Renderer and menu payload authority remains requestId-only for the local-file entry.
Clean DOCX, tracked-changes-only DOCX, unsafe or invalid DOCX input, cancel, oversized file, changed file, read failure, and renderer authority injection remain fail-closed or passive.
The product proof keeps DOCX review local-file entry separate from DOCX import preview and DOCX safe-create flows.
nonClaims: No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No DOCX tracked-change apply is claimed.
No exact apply from DOCX is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by DOCX comments-only review preview.
No project truth write is performed by DOCX comments-only review preview.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by DOCX comments-only review preview.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No Word layout parity or full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud, sync, accounts, cross-platform readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: DOCX remains external evidence transport and never becomes project truth.
DOCX comments-only review preview is a Review Bridge product proof, not a content import flow.
CommentThread content and CommentPlacement targeting stay separate.
CommentPlacements produced from DOCX anchors remain manual and do not authorize text mutation.
Tracked changes remain diagnostic-only and do not become textChanges or applyOps.
The Review surface is UI/session visibility only and does not become a source of truth.
Delivery rebind for PR 1015 is a precondition truth sync, not a new product capability.

node --test targeted Review mutate, DOCX import boundary, menu, and release claim boundary contracts

agentAudits.verdict: runtime path already narrow and honest; missing gap is proof and status-layer closeout rather than product behavior
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by delivery rebind, product proof status, strengthened local-file command contract assertions, and factual docs sync
